translation: lest you put me to shame
and have Su-Hubur clear your affairs
put in a word on my behalf
where your father and grandfather have been clothed
you too should take a joint-stock fund
and like him he had intense commercial contacts
with a group of men in Assur
he in turn was an uncle of Imdi-ilum
who was very active in this circle of traders
the joint-stock capital was tied to the individual trader
every adult member would manage such a fund
and at least some of them would also have investments
a letter from Assur-idi in Assur to Assur-nada
people less important than you administer joint-stock investments
and people less important than myself have invested
to get hold of all the investments he can lay his hands on
transliteration: i-na sé-ri-a i di tic ni mi

translation: in Anatolia and to come to Assur
to have his status as manager of such a fund regulated
such a partnership would be dissolved at the death
investments in a naruqqum could be inherited
after the death of the investor
we have a few texts that tell us
that after the death of the important trader Pûsu-ken
his sons inherited shares of his investments
bought these from two of his brothers
transliteration: 6 1/2 ma-na A sùr ma lik DUMU En-um-'IM

translation: a document in the Salim-Assur archive
in the joint-stock fund of one of the members
the house of Assur-imitti and Hunniya

translation: Immediately after the death of Salim-Assur the younger son Al-ahum, who had been with the father in the city Durhumit when he died, wrote to his brother Ennam-Assur: Sadly, our father has died. It is not Salim-Assur who is our father, it is you who are our father. Take care there of our father's instructions and clear the affair.
transliteration: la li-bi i-li-ma a-bu-ni : me-et la SCaI-ma-A-sur a-bu-ni a-ta a-bu-ni a-ma-kam a-na ti-ir-ti; a-bi4-ni i-hi-rid-ma za-ki-i

translation: Sadly, our father has died. It is not Salim-Assur who is our father, it is you who are our father. Take care there of our father's instructions and clear the affair.
